name: fetch_lds_graphql_schema
description: Fetches the full GraphQL introspection schema from a connected Salesforce org and saves it to the local filesystem. Returns only the file path and metadata — the schema content never enters the conversation context. Use the saved schema file path in your codegen.yml and ESLint graphql config.

usernameOrAlias.description: Username or alias of the Salesforce org to introspect. If not specified, use the #get_username tool.

directory.description: Directory of the Salesforce project. Used to resolve local default orgs and aliases. Defaults to current working directory.

outputPath.description: File path to write the schema SDL. Relative paths resolve from the nearest project root. Defaults to schema.graphql

apiVersion.description: Salesforce API version (e.g. "62.0"). Uses org default if omitted
